auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue learning with MindGuide.
auth.registerSubtitle: Sign up and start your learning journey.
auth.switchToLogin: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.errorEmailTaken: This email address is already taken.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeysDescription: Add your own API key to use it instead of the default one.

chat.welcomeMessage:
What do you want to figure out today? 🤔

Math, languages, history or anything else — just ask!
chat.errorNoKey: I haven't been set up yet 🔧 — please let your teacher know.
chat.errorAuth: My access isn't working right now 🔑 — your teacher needs to check the API key.
chat.errorRateLimit: I'm quite busy right now! ⏳ Wait a moment and ask me again.
chat.errorServerError: Something's gone wrong on my end 🤕 — try again in a few minutes.
chat.errorNetwork: I can't be reached right now 📡 — check if your internet is working.
chat.errorGeneric: Oops, that didn't work 😅 — just try again!

hero.tagline: Not the answer — the path to it.

footer.tagline: AI tutoring for students — understand, don't just copy.
